---
title: "Projects"
canonical-url: https://matyaslevinsky.github.io/projects.html
description: "Data projects and analyses by Matyáš Levínský."
listing:
  contents: posts/projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
toc: false
---

Personal projects I have worked on, separate from my work at PAQ Research.
